options.name: --inputs
options.description:
Required. Comma-separated list of input file or
directory paths. Accepts files with extensions: cs,
sln, csproj, dll, exe. For directories, includes
all .cs files. Use '*' for recursive search.

options.name: --output
options.description:
(Default: ./diagram.txt) File path for the
generated diagrams. Default is './diagram.txt'.

options.name: --types
options.description:
(Default: namespace,class,property,field)
Comma-separated list of types to collect:
namespace, class, struct, interface, method,
property, field, enum. Default is
'namespace,class,property,field'.

options.name: --filter-namespace
options.description:
(Default: .*) Comma-separated list of namespaces to
include. Accepts wildcards. Default is '.*'.

options.name: --write-types
options.description:
(Default: false) Include type information in the
diagram. Default is false.

options.name: --indent
options.description:
(Default: 2) Number of spaces for indentation in
the output. Default is 2.

options.name: --brackets
options.description:
(Default: `) Character used for brackets in the
diagram. Default is '`'.

options.name: --between-name-type
options.description:
(Default:  : ) String used between name and type in
the diagram. Default is ' : '.

options.name: --prefix-group
options.description:
(Default: **) Prefix used for groups in the
diagram. Default is '**'.

options.name: --prefix-items
options.description:
(Default: - ) Prefix used for items in the diagram.
Default is '- '.

options.name: --auto
options.description:
(Default: false) Automatically open the output file
after writing. Default is false.

options.name: --verbose
options.description:
(Default: false) Enable verbose logging. Default is
false.
